claim_boundary: Phase 12 uses descriptive metadata math only. It does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, validated anomaly detection, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase12_goal: Compute graph, entropy, density, diversity, and concentration summaries over normalized records, candidate pairs, inspection records, review packets, Phase 10 patterns, and Phase 11 negative-space candidates.
purpose: Apply bounded descriptive mathematical overlays to worldwide metadata artifacts without claiming prediction, causality, validated anomaly detection, or truth resolution.
